# cloudru-community_placement_group (Resource)

Cloud.ru placement group (managed via Compute API).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Placement group name (1–64 chars, must start with a letter).
- `policy` (String) Placement policy: `soft-anti-affinity` or `anti-affinity`. Cannot be changed after creation.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Placement group description (0–255 chars).
- `project_id` (String) Project ID. Defaults to the provider project_id.
- `tags` (Block List) Tags attached to this placement group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--tags))

### Read-Only

- `availability_zones` (Block List) Availability zones where the placement group is active. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--availability_zones))
- `created_time` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC 3339).
- `id` (String) Placement group ID.
- `modified_time` (String) Last modification timestamp (RFC 3339).

<a id="nestedblock--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Required:

- `id` (String) Tag ID.

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Tag name.


<a id="nestedblock--availability_zones"></a>
### Nested Schema for `availability_zones`

Read-Only:

- `availability_zone_id` (String) Availability zone ID.
- `availability_zone_name` (String) Availability zone name.
- `max_vm_count` (Number) Maximum number of VMs allowed in this availability zone.
- `state` (String) State of the placement group in this availability zone.
- `vm_count` (Number) Current number of VMs in this availability zone.
